14. Lords of Decanates and Horas. The Lords of decanates are first Lord of the same Rasi,
second Lord of the 5th Rasi therefrom and third Lord of the 9th from the Rasi in question. The
first Hora of an odd Rasi belongs to the Sun, while the second one is ruled by the Moon. In
the case of an even Rasi the first Hora is ruled by the Moon and the second by the Sun.
15. Lords of Trimsamsas. In odd Signs 5, 5, 8, 7 and 5 degrees are Trimsamsas of Mars, Saturn,
Jupiter, Mercury and Venus, respectively, while the arrangement is reverse in even Signs.
16. Lords of Sapthamsas. The Sapthamsas for the 12 Rasis from Aries onwards are,
respectively, counted from Aries, Scorpio, Gemini, Capricorn, Leo, Pisces, Libra, Taurus,
Sagittarius, Cancer, Aquarius and Virgo. The Lords thereof are those, in whose Rasis they
fall.
l7. The total of the number of Horas and that of decanates is sixty (24+36) in the entire Zodiac.
